title: Semantic Search: Embedding Service Abstraction
impact: Foundation for AI-powered semantic search; Supports multiple embedding providers

tasks.description: Define Embedding Service Interface - Create EmbeddingService interface with embed(), embedBatch(), and dimensions properties; Define SemanticSearchResult interface
acceptanceCriteria: SemanticSearchResult with entity and similarity fields

tasks.description: Implement OpenAI Embedding Service - Create OpenAIEmbeddingService class using text-embedding-3-small model, implement embed() and embedBatch() with proper error handling and rate limiting
acceptanceCriteria: embedBatch() batches up to 2048 texts per request
Handles API errors with descriptive messages
Respects rate limits with exponential backoff

tasks.description: Implement Local Embedding Service - Create LocalEmbeddingService using @xenova/transformers with all-MiniLM-L6-v2 model, implement lazy initialization and single/batch embedding
acceptanceCriteria: initialize() method for lazy model loading
embedBatch() processes texts sequentially (no parallel for local)
Works offline after initial model download

tasks.description: Create Embedding Service Factory - Implement factory function that creates appropriate embedding service based on environment configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Throws descriptive error for missing API key

tasks.description: Add Environment Variables for Embeddings - Document and implement environment variable parsing for embedding configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Constants exported for use in services

tasks.description: Create Embedding Service Tests - Test both OpenAI and Local implementations with mocks
acceptanceCriteria: OpenAI service tests with mocked fetch
Local service tests with mocked transformers

successCriteria: OpenAI implementation with proper API handling
Factory creates services from environment config
notes: This sprint creates the embedding abstraction layer that supports both cloud (OpenAI) and local (transformers.js) embeddings. The local option is important for offline use and avoiding API costs. The @xenova/transformers dependency is optional - users who don't want semantic search won't need it.
